evals.prompt: Create a JVM dashboard so I can monitor my Java service.
evals.expected_output: Agent paginates signoz_list_dashboards (no JVM dashboard found), confirms creation with the user, calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates with searchContext='jvm' and picks the JVM catalog entry. Runs the Step 3b-i.1 no-data probe via signoz_list_metrics with searchText='jvm' and timeRange=1h; finds JVM metrics flowing, proceeds silently to signoz_import_dashboard with the chosen template path. On success, reports the created dashboard's title, panel count, sections, and variables, and offers a customization or alerting follow-up.
expectations: Agent calls signoz_list_dashboards before any write operation
Agent calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates to look for a JVM template
Agent runs a no-data probe (signoz_list_metrics with a jvm-related searchText) before importing
Agent calls signoz_import_dashboard with the JVM template path
Agent reports the created dashboard title, panel count, or section breakdown

evals.prompt: Create a dashboard for my PostgreSQL database.
evals.expected_output: Agent paginates signoz_list_dashboards (no Postgres dashboard), confirms creation, calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates and picks the postgresql/postgresql.json catalog entry. Runs the Step 3b-i.1 no-data probe via signoz_list_metrics searchText='postgresql' timeRange=1h; the probe returns empty. CRITICAL: agent MUST emit the verbatim warning from SKILL.md Step 3b-i.1 and wait for the user's choice. Must NOT silently call signoz_import_dashboard.
expectations: Agent calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates and picks the postgresql template
Agent runs a no-data probe via signoz_list_metrics with a postgresql-related searchText
Agent emits a warning message noting data is not found before calling signoz_import_dashboard
Agent waits for user confirmation before calling signoz_import_dashboard (does not import silently)

evals.prompt: I need an APM dashboard - what do you have?
evals.expected_output: Agent recognises the request is broad and exploratory. Paginates signoz_list_dashboards (no existing APM dashboard). Calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates with category='Apm' to enumerate APM templates, presents the narrowed list to the user, and asks them to pick before calling signoz_import_dashboard. Must NOT pick a template silently when the request is ambiguous.
expectations: Agent calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates with a category filter (e.g. category='Apm')
Agent presents multiple template options to the user and asks them to choose
Agent does NOT silently call signoz_import_dashboard without user selection

evals.prompt: Set up a dashboard for monitoring my Redis cluster.
evals.expected_output: Agent paginates signoz_list_dashboards across all pages and detects an existing 'Redis - Overview' (or similarly-named) dashboard. Surfaces the duplicate with name, UUID, and createdAt and presents the three options: '(a) modify, (b) create new, (c) stop'. Must NOT call signoz_create_dashboard or signoz_import_dashboard before the user picks.
expectations: Agent calls signoz_list_dashboards (paginated) and finds a similar existing Redis dashboard
Agent presents the existing dashboard name/UUID to the user with modify/create/stop options
Agent does NOT call signoz_import_dashboard or signoz_create_dashboard before the user responds to the duplicate prompt

evals.prompt: Create a dashboard to track our payment processing pipeline — I want to see request rate, p99 latency, and error rate per service across checkout, payments, and notifications.
evals.expected_output: Agent paginates signoz_list_dashboards (no payment dashboard). Confirms creation. Calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates — no match, falls through to custom build. Discovery via signoz_get_field_keys and signoz_get_field_values. Reads signoz://dashboard/* MCP resources. Builds JSON with OTel attribute names, error-rate formula F1=A*100/B, and variables. Runs data probes. Emits JSON preview + summary BEFORE calling signoz_create_dashboard. Performs shape check.
expectations: Agent calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates and finds no matching template before proceeding to custom build
Agent calls signoz_get_field_keys or signoz_get_field_values to discover resource attributes
Agent reads signoz://dashboard/ MCP resources (instructions, widgets-instructions, or widgets-examples)
Agent emits a JSON preview or summary of the dashboard before calling signoz_create_dashboard
Agent uses OTel attribute names (service.name, not 'service') in filters or groupBy
Agent calls signoz_create_dashboard to create the dashboard
Agent includes an error rate formula or multiple queries combining error count and total count

evals.prompt: Build me a dashboard for some k8s pods.
evals.expected_output: Request is too vague (no cluster, namespace, or pod set). Agent must NOT proceed to signoz_create_dashboard with a guessed scope. Either emits a structured needs_input block listing 'resource_scope' as missing with candidates discovered via signoz_get_field_values, or proposes the k8s catalog template and asks the user to confirm scope before importing. Must explicitly ask the user to clarify cluster/namespace before any write tool.
expectations: Agent does NOT call signoz_create_dashboard or signoz_import_dashboard without first clarifying scope with the user
Agent either emits a needs_input block or asks a clarifying question about the cluster or namespace
Agent calls signoz_get_field_values or signoz_list_dashboard_templates to discover candidates before prompting
